name: Peanut Butter Dream Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs until frothy.
2. Gradually beat in the sugar until dissolved.
3. Add the peanut butter and corn syrup, beating until well blended.
4. Stir in the cream, milk, and vanilla.
5. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker and follow the manufacturer's instructions.
6. Freeze until firm.
Makes 2 quarts
